perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a male host wearing a cap and glasses, speaking directly to the camera with a graphic of AirPods Pro 3 overlaid on the screen. (2) Transitions to close-up shots of the AirPods Pro 3 charging case mounted on a stand, rotating slightly. (3) Screen captures of a smartphone interface demonstrating live translation and heart rate tracking data are shown. (4) A graphic displays five different sizes of ear tips. (5) The host is shown outdoors walking in a park, wearing the white earbuds and demonstrating their fit while moving. (6) Close-ups of the earbuds in his ear while he is walking and talking.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice starts speaking in a clear, upbeat, and informative tone in Mandarin. (2) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music begins and continues throughout the video. (3) Light ambient outdoor wind and environmental noise are heard during the park segment. (4) Subtle sound effects (swooshes or pings) coincide with the appearance of text graphics and scene transitions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese translating the host's speech. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'AirPods Pro 3' (Title), '#1 主動式降噪功能' (Active Noise Cancellation), '#2 即時翻譯功能' (Real-time Translation), '#3 心率偵測功能' (Heart Rate Detection), '#4 五款耳塞供選擇' (Five ear tip options), '(增加) 2個小時' (Increased by 2 hours), 'IP57' (Water/Dust resistance rating).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Feature List -> Practical Outdoor Demo -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator appearing both indoors and outdoors.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a blue/grey flat cap, and a white hoodie with a yellow lanyard around his neck.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The indoor scene features a plain grey wall with a circular wall decoration. The outdoor scene is a grassy field or park with trees and a soccer goal visible in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural light and soft indoor studio lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Presentation -> Real-world Demo -> Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional tech review intended to inform viewers about the rumored or newly released features of the AirPods Pro 3, highlighting improvements in noise cancellation, battery life, and health tracking to encourage interest or purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host prominently features Apple branding and focuses entirely on the positive features of a specific product.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Host uses a consistent greeting and a high-energy delivery style typical of tech influencers in the region.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses high-density text overlays to maintain viewer engagement in a short-form vertical format.
